header.headline: Forward / Backward Flow
header.subtitle: Training architecture is a dual-lane system: activations move forward, gradients move back, and memory policy ties them together.

forward.title: Forward Pass
forward.body: Activations and logits move through the model in the user-visible direction.

cache.title: Saved State
cache.body: Selected tensors must survive long enough for backward without exhausting memory.

backward.title: Backward Pass
backward.body: Gradients consume saved state and propagate credit back through the graph.

update.title: Optimizer Step
update.body: Weight updates close the loop and define the next forward contract.

outcome.title: Training Loop
outcome.body: The flow is healthy when forward, memory, backward, and update remain aligned.

footer.note: Forward/backward diagrams teach composition across time, not just static topology.
